dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.demoBanner: Showing demo data: the API gateway is unavailable or there are no recipients yet.
dashboard.forecastSoon: Soon this space will show an intelligent forecast of possible delays for your parcels, flights, warehouse congestion and other useful information. Helpful recommendations will appear here too. Banderoli.AI is already gathering the statistics needed for this.

advisor.okDetail: You can order with peace of mind. Recipient {recipient} still has ≈ {rem} GEL (~${remUsd}) before the limit for the peak arrival day.
advisor.exceededDetail: The combined value on an arrival day is above 300 GEL — VAT and duty are likely on import. Details below.
advisor.riskDetail: Parcels may arrive together and exceed the 300 GEL limit. Check the dates below.
advisor.noticeExceeded: Limit exceeded: {recipient} — “{parcel}” ({value} GEL of {limit}). VAT 18% and duty on the full value are likely — budget for the tax.
advisor.noticeSameDayExceeded: Booked for one day ({date}): {recipient} — {list} = {value} GEL of {limit}. Arriving together exceeds the limit — better not to book for this date.
advisor.noticeSameDayWithin: Booked for one day ({date}): {recipient} — {list} = {value} GEL of {limit}. Within the limit for now, but book new orders for this date carefully.
advisor.noticeNearDay: Merge risk ({range}): {recipient} — {list} = {value} GEL of {limit}. The dates are close — if flights shift, parcels may arrive on the same day and exceed the limit.

archive.title: Archive
archive.subtitle: All shipments: {count}. Filter by status, recipient, store, carrier or tracking code.

form.adviceExceeded: If they arrive together, this parcel will exceed the limit of {name} by {amount} GEL — VAT on the full amount is likely.
form.adviceNear: Almost at the limit: if the parcels arrive on the same day, {name} will have ≈ {rem} GEL (~${remUsd}) left.
form.adviceOk: If the parcels arrive on the same day, {name} will have ≈ {rem} GEL (~${remUsd}) left before the limit.
form.totalHint: Total = items + shipping, converted to GEL at the NBG rate. Shipping also counts toward the 300 GEL limit.

cartImport.desc: Drop a screenshot of your Amazon, eBay, AliExpress or any store cart here — AI will recognize the items, prices, shipping cost and store and fill in the form for you.
cartImport.dropOrClick: Drop a screenshot or click to choose
cartImport.fileTypes: PNG, JPEG, WEBP · up to 5 MB
cartImport.tip: Tip: zoom out (Ctrl −) so the whole cart fits on screen, and double-check the recognized data against your cart.
cartImport.done: Done: items recognized — {count}{currencyPart}{remainingPart}. Check the fields below.
